stemHtml: A "runway strip" is defined as an area including the runway and…

options.a: A stopway (if provided), intended to reduce damage risk to aircraft running off the runway and to protect aircraft flying over it during take-off and landing.
options.b: A taxiway, intended to protect aircraft on the taxiway and reduce damage risk from runway overruns.
options.c: A clearway (if provided), intended to reduce damage risk from runway overruns and protect overflying aircraft.
options.d: A taxiway, intended to protect aircraft on the runway and reduce damage risk from taxiway overruns.
